title: PagerDuty Escalation Policy Depth Exhausted Without Acknowledgement
spl:
index=alerts sourcetype="pagerduty:incident"
| where escalation_count >= 4 AND status != "resolved"
| eval age_m=(now()-created_at_epoch)/60
| where age_m > 30
| table incident_number, service_name, escalation_policy, age_m, status
| sort -age_m
description: Deep escalations burn out multiple responder tiers for one root cause.
value: Surfaces incidents paging past normal L1/L2 paths.
implementation: Map policy names to business services; page leadership only after validation.
